title: SDE - II
description:
**Description**
 Have you ever ordered from Amazon and been amazed at how fast you receive the shipment? Ever wondered how Amazon delivers to customers so fast and on promised time? Every day, Amazon engineers are relentlessly working to decrease the time between clicking and delivery for our customers. Amazon Fulfillment Technologies (AFT) organization owns the software and infrastructure that powers Amazon’s world\\-class fulfillment centers. We build software which interfaces with the robots, machines and human associates at the warehouse and facilitate various processes that run the global network of fulfillment centers moving millions of units of inventory and ensuring customers get what they want, when promised. These systems underlie everything we do – tens of millions of items in the catalog, hundreds of millions of units of inventory, and billions of transactions each year!
   

  

 This role is for the AFT Inbound Foundations and Routing team (IBFR) team which is responsible to build core software components/services that orchestrate the movement of inventory within a warehouse and interfacing with sortation and SCOT systems for high fidelity promise and planning decisions. Worldwide, the IBFR team supports 570\\+ FCs across NA, EU and JP regions.
   

  

 With rapid expansion into new geographies, innovations in supply chain, delivery models and customer experience, increasingly complex transportation network, ever expanding selection of products and growing number of shipments worldwide, we have an opportunity to build software that scales the business, leads the industry through innovation and delights millions of customers worldwide. We have challenging problems (both business and technical) that leverages new technologies that support our high volume, low latency and high availability services.
   

  

 If you are looking for an opportunity to solve deep technical problems and build innovative solutions in a fast paced environment working with smart, passionate software developers, this might be the role for you. A successful candidate for this position will be able to build new software from the ground up, create pragmatic solutions for complex business problems, enjoy working closely with operations staff in Amazon fulfillment centers around the world.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

 3\\+ years of non\\-internship professional software development experience

title: Fronted Developer
description:
We are Valtech Mobility, a strategic business unit of Valtech Group, dedicated to improving mobility by making it safer, smarter and more enjoyable. Our primary goal is to develop cutting\\-edge connected vehicle technologies for global mobility providers and vehicle OEMs such as VW, Toyota, Porsche, Audi, Lamborghini, Skoda.
   

  

 As a technical expert, you'll be part of our global Connected Vehicle team. As a hidden champion and pioneer in connected vehicle technology, more than 30 million vehicles in 65 countries enjoy more than 50 different connected car services in the areas of infotainment, telematics and V2X/Car2x.
   

  

 By joining our expert panel, you will be part of the connected vehicle revolution and its next level of evolution. You will rub shoulders with international industry experts who have decades of experience working with brands such as Porsche, Lamborghini, Bentley, and Audi, to name a few.
   

  

 If you enjoy working on challenging projects in a culture that values freedom and accountability. Apply now to be contacted.
   

  

**What You Do**
* Build high\\-quality user interfaces for connected vehicle experiences spanning infotainment dashboards, portals, and complex data visualizations.
* Collaborate closely with backend and platform engineers to design contracts, optimize API consumption, and ensure reliability at scale.
* Drive performance, accessibility, and internationalization from the ground up; instrument and monitor UX KPIs to improve continuously.
* Contribute to architecture decisions, code reviews, and shared libraries; mentor peers and champion best practices.
* Take ownership of features across the full lifecycle—ideation, build, release, and operations—within a culture of freedom and accountability


**Additional Requirements**
* Experience building component libraries/design systems; proficiency with CSS\\-in\\-JS or utility\\-first frameworks (e.g., Tailwind) while keeping semantics and accessibility front\\-and\\-center.
* Exposure to web observability and monitoring tools (e.g., New Relic, Dynatrace, ELK Stack, Grafana) for front\\-end performance and user experience metrics.
* Experience automating software integration, testing, delivery, and deployment for front\\-end assets (CI/CD, bundlers, artifact management).
* Practical experience deploying to cloud platforms (Azure / AWS), infrastructure\\-as\\-code (Terraform) for front\\-end hosting/CDN configuration.
* Understanding of web security best practices (OWASP), CSP, dependency management, and threat modeling relevant to front\\-end applications.


**What We Ask**
* Ownership mindset: You take end\\-to\\-end responsibility—from design and implementation through to production operations and continuous improvement.
* Core web fundamentals: Strong proficiency in HTML, CSS (including modern layout techniques like Flexbox/Grid), and JavaScript (ES6\\+).
* Modern frameworks: Hands\\-on experience building production\\-grade applications with React and TypeScript; familiarity with Next.js for server\\-side rendering/SSG; experience with Angular (v12\\+) is a plus.
* Architecture \\& patterns: Ability to design scalable front\\-end architectures, apply design patterns, and structure large SPA/MPA codebases for maintainability.
* API integration: Deep experience integrating REST and GraphQL APIs, handling authentication, caching, pagination, and error states.
* Quality practices: Skilled in testing (unit, integration, and E2E) using tools like Jest/React Testing Library/Cypress, with a TDD mindset where appropriate.
* Performance \\& reliability: Proven track record optimizing performance (Core Web Vitals), accessibility (WCAG), internationalization, and responsive UI.
* DevOps awareness: Practical knowledge of CI/CD for front\\-end (e.g., Git\\-based workflows, build pipelines), and experience operating front\\-ends in modern cloud environments.
* Agile delivery: Experience working in agile teams (Scrum, Kanban, SAFe or similar).
* Domain curiosity: Willingness to learn the connected vehicle domain and become a subject matter expert in automotive UX and data flows.
* Communication: Excellent communication skills, strong command of English, and comfort working in globally distributed teams.


**If you do not meet all the listed qualifications or have gaps in your experience, we still encourage you to apply. At Valtech, we recognize that talent comes in many forms, and we value diverse perspectives and a willingness to learn.**
**Commitment to reaching all kinds of people**
 We design experiences that work for all kinds of people \\- and that starts with our own teams. At Valtech, we’re intentional about building an inclusive culture where everyone feels supported to grow, thrive and achieve their goals. No matter your background, you belong here. Explore our Diversity \\& Inclusion site to see how we’re creating a more equitable Valtech for all.
   

  

**The Benefits**
 This is a
 **Full\\-Time** 
 position based in
 **Ahmedabad**

**Your application process**

 Valtech is the experience innovation company that exists to unlock a better way to experience the world. By blending crafts, categories, and cultures, we help brands unlock new value in an increasingly digital world.

While we are building a strong team to progress our cutting edge sensing technologies on a MEMS platform (close engagement with premier research institutions in India), we are now focussing on developing in\\-house electronics chip building capabilities. We’re looking for a passionate and self\\-driven System Application Leadto join our dynamic team and take ownership of critical design challenges. The Company has recently secured a healthy Seed Round of funding and has also been approved for the Design Linked Incentive scheme of MeitY, which shall fuel our next stage of growth.
   

  

**Role Overview**
 As a System Application Engineer (staff/senior staff) you will be the technical face of our next\\-generation Gas Sensing Solution employing our state of the art MEMS Sensor and Analog Front\\-End (AFE) chip family. You will take ownership in translating high\\-level customer problems into complete, production\\-ready reference designs. Drawing on deep mixed\\-signal expertise, you will create evaluation boards, application notes, design tools and in\\-field demos that accelerate customer design\\-in and showcase our Gas Sensor \\+ AFE SoC’s competitive edge. Your insights will directly shape product and silicon road\\-maps and go\\-to\\-market collateral
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Own the reference design strategy where you will define, architect and deliver PCB \\+ firmware reference designs that solve real customer use\\-cases for Gas Sensing Applications.
* Engage with end\\-customers to distil application requirements, performance gaps and emerging trends.
* Collateral creation – author application notes, user guides, BOMs, schematics, simulation models and embedded drivers
* Design, bring\\-up and validate evaluation boards; implement automated test scripts for performance verification
* Capture field learnings, benchmark competition, and feed quantitative data back to marketing \\& design
* Present at webinars, industry forums and author technical blogs to position our Gas Sensing Solution as the reference platform


**What We’re Looking For**
* B.Tech/M.Tech/Ph.D. in EE/ECE with 8\\+ years experience in system applications engineering for mixed\\-signal ICs and sensing solutions. with at least one end\\-to\\-end AFE, data\\-acquisition or sensor\\-interface product in volume production
* Proven track record creating reference designs/eval boards and associated collateral for tier\\-1 customers
* Expert knowledge of analog signal\\-chains (ADC/DAC, PGAs, low\\-noise amps, sensor excitation), embedded MCU/RISC\\-V or ARM subsystems, and precision power supplies
* Hands\\-on proficiency with PCB design, lab instrumentation, scripting (Python/LabVIEW), and C/C\\+\\+ firmware
* Strong customer\\-facing communication skills and ability to convey complex trade\\-offs to both executives and design engineers
* Experience in industrial or automotive sensor systems with strict EMC/EMI and safety compliance


**Nice To Have**
* Familiarity with IEC 61010, IEC 60079, ISO 13485 or IEC 61508, ISO 26262 functional\\-safety flows
* Knowledge of sensor technologies (e.g., MEMS, piezoelectric, or capacitive sensors).
* Digital signal processing (DSP) , AI/ML techniques for sensor data processing.


 Why Join Us?
   

  

* Lead the system\\-level vision for a Gas Sensing Solutions that will anchor multiple vertical platforms.
* Influence product and silicon road\\-maps while remaining deeply hands\\-on with hardware, firmware and real customer problems.
* Be a key player in an innovative Indian startup shaping the future of sensor technology.
* Competitive compensation, ESOP , and a vibrant work culture.
